name: Gemini 3.1 Flash Live
summary: real-time voice model in the developer API — build conversational voice apps with low latency, successor to Gemini 2.5 Flash Native Audio

name: Mistral Speech
summary: open-source text-to-speech model for building voice agents — Apache 2.0, competes with ElevenLabs at zero licensing cost

name: Claude Code Auto Mode
summary: Claude Code now pauses less for approval — ships tasks faster end-to-end while keeping guardrails, new statusline and plugin controls

name: GPT Image 1.5 API
summary: image editing and generation in the API at $0.009/image — 4x faster than v1, strong image preservation for in-app editing flows

name: Claude Code Channels
summary: send messages from Telegram or Discord into a running Claude Code session — full filesystem, MCP, and git access from your phone

name: Adobe Firefly Custom Models
summary: train a personal style model on your own images in public beta — capture a specific look or character and reuse it across Firefly's creative workspace

name: Google Stitch
summary: vibe design tool: describe a UI goal in plain english or voice, get multiple design directions + working prototype — free beta, integrates with Claude Code and Cursor

name: Cursor Composer 2
summary: Cursor's first in-house coding model — built for long-horizon agentic tasks, 200K context window, cuts costs up to 86% vs prior models, available to all users now
